text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm about to eat lunch, when I once again spot
two familiar faces.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
All right! Permission to cook here has been
obtained! Let's get down to business!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Let's really knock it out of the park with
these sandwiches!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It'll be a guaranteed roaring success! I put all my
love into buying these vegetables!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Wow, very colorful! You really chose a lot of
green and yellow ones, huh?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Everyone always says they want to eat
more veggies! A nutritious diet is the key to good
running, after all!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Which is why I'm going to make some healthy and
nutrient-packed sandwiches! That'll really help
everyone achieve their goals!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm curious to see how well they cook this time
and take a seat nearby to watch.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Stir the eggs, then it's time for... OIL! Pour in a
ton of oil, then st—

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Stop! Please! The recipe says only a little oil!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're right! Too much will give it too many
calories. I'll just lightly drizzle it then!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Next is to fry it for five minutes! Okay! Turning
the heat to MAX, and...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Wait!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh, I understand! The only thing I should set aflame is my own heart!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I'll pour my heart into it for five minutes!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
HAAAAAH! You all work so hard, everyone! Keep
up the good fight! Bakushin it up!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Done!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Oooooh! It looks so good!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Doesn't it?! That's just what good class
representatives like me do!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
You really are the perfect class representative! I
know everyone is going to be thrilled!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh, stop! Do you really think so? Oh, go on! You're sooo right!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
They must be bursting with anticipation! Hehe, I
think I can hear them!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Agh! What am I waiting for?! I must bring the
people what they want!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: BAAAKUSHIN! BAKUSHIIIIN!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Ah! W-wait for meee!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: You're going to crush the sandwicheees!
